generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time environmental metrics including temperature and humidity via standardized MQTT protocols through Eclipse Hono device management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTelemetryStream
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Presence detection sensors integrated into BIM model as device metadata, feeding real-time occupancy status data to the DT via bidirectional Ditto communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meters capturing real-time energy consumption metrics (electricity, water, HVAC) with tenant-specific configurations extracted from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionTelemetry
]

instance StructuralHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vibration and strain sensors monitoring structural integrity with data processed for predictive maintenance alerts through Ditto's plugin architecture."
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralHealthDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalTelemetryStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance StructuralHealthDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralHealthSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D/4D Building Information Model enriched with device metadata including sensor/actuator configurations and control logic specifications."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelToTextTransformer
]

instance RuntimeOperationalDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representation of real-time operational data generated via model-to-text transformations from BIM models, serving as input for visualization and analytics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model integrated via Unreal Engine plugins for energy consumption forecasting and adaptive optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISReinforcementLearning
]

instance ControlLogicConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for building control systems (e.g., TwinLight lighting policies) embedded in BIM and deployed as runtime artifacts via Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance EnvironmentalTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed environmental metrics (temperature, humidity) transmitted via MQTT from IoT sensors, used for visualization and energy optimization calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTelemetryStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data processed for dynamic lighting/HVAC adjustments and space utilization analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OccupancyBasedAdjustmentService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated energy consumption metrics with tenant-specific breakdowns, serving as input for cost optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance StructuralHealthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vibration and strain data processed for predictive maintenance alerts and structural integrity assessments."
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralHealthDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitBIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for creating static 3D/4D building models with integrated device metadata configurations."
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Device management middleware handling telemetry ingestion, authentication, and protocol conversion (MQTT) for IoT sensor data."
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication platform enabling real-time synchronization between physical actuators and digital twin components via tenant-based isolation."
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D/4D visualization platform supporting interactive monitoring, simulation plugins, and real-time data visualization."
]

instance ModelToTextTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool transforming BIM models into deployable runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine plugins)."
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearning : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive optimization framework using reinforcement learning for dynamic control logic adjustments and energy consumption forecasting."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations in Unreal Engine 5 with real-time sensor data overlay."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceVisualization
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for reducing operational costs through adaptive energy consumption management."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast
]

instance OccupancyBasedAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of lighting and HVAC setpoints based on real-time occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortOptimization
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in sensor streams to preempt equipment failures with maintenance scheduling recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlerts
]

instance FacilityManagementDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual analytics platform for Facility Managers to monitor building performance and optimize resource allocation."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceDashboards
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D immersive representation of current building state with real-time sensor data visualization in Unreal Engine."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output showing expected energy consumption patterns for cost optimization planning."
]

instance VisualComfortOptimization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for dynamic lighting adjustments based on occupancy patterns to enhance visual comfort."
]

instance MaintenanceAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for potential equipment failures based on structural health sensor data analysis."
]

instance PerformanceDashboards : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual analytics platform for Facility Managers to monitor building performance and optimize resource allocation."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on real-time occupancy and reinforcement learning optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSetpointAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of HVAC systems parameters based on occupancy patterns and energy efficiency targets."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceSchedule : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of maintenance schedules based on predictive failure analysis from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded building control system actuator configured via Ditto middleware to execute adaptive lighting control policies from the digital twin."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building automation system controller receiving bidirectional commands from the digital twin for dynamic setpoint adjustments."
]

instance ShadingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized window shading system controlled via Ditto's plugin architecture for energy-efficient daylight harvesting."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Unified virtual representation of physical building infrastructure integrating BIM models with real-time operational data."
    base:contains BIMStaticModel, RuntimeOperationalDataModel, PredictiveAnalyticsModel,
                 ControlLogicConfiguration, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5,
                 LightingActuator, HVACController, ShadingSystemActuator,
                 TemperatureHumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 StructuralHealthSensor
]

// C5: Data Flows
instance BIMEnrichment : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed BIM model with augmented runtime semantics including device configurations and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMStaticModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelToTextTransformer
]

instance DittoConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Deployable configuration artifacts generated from BIM models for Ditto middleware deployment."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichment
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance UnrealEnginePlugin : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Custom Unreal Engine plugins generated from BIM models for visualization and simulation integration."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichment
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance ControlLogicDeployment : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime control logic configurations deployed to building control systems via Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlLogicConfiguration
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C12: Component Relationships
instance ActuatorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Middleware component managing bidirectional communication between digital twin control logic and physical actuators."
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine-based visualization component displaying real-time building performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceVisualization
]

instance AnalyticsEngine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics component processing operational data for optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast, VisualComfortOptimization, MaintenanceAlerts
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals** generated by the DT and sent to physical actuators through the middleware layer. The DT processes inputs (e.g., occupancy data, energy consumption trends) to generate optimized control commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints), which are transmitted back to the BCS via Ditto’s **bidirectional API**. This interaction is automated through **model-driven deployment**, where BIM-based device configurations are transformed into runtime artifacts for seamless actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and near-real-time**, with synchronization frequencies determined by sensor data streams (e.g., sub-second for critical metrics like temperature, millisecond-level for occupancy sensors). The DT supports **event-driven updates** (e.g., occupancy changes) and **periodic polling** (e.g., hourly energy consumption reports). The framework ensures **low-latency processing** (<100ms for critical control loops) via middleware-optimized data pipelines."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for static and dynamic data integration.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (device management) and Ditto (bidirectional communication) for real-time synchronization.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D/4D monitoring.
   - **Service Layer**: Modular microservices (e.g., lighting control, HVAC optimization) deployed via Ditto’s tenant-based isolation.
   - **Extension Layer**: Custom plugins for domain-specific analytics or third-party integrations (e.g., IoT platforms, cloud services)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During design, the DT augments BIM models with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor placements, control logic). In construction, it supports **automated commissioning** of BCS components. During operation, it enables **continuous monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive optimization** (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning for lighting systems)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between physical and virtual states, validated via **real-time telemetry comparison**.
   - **Verification**: Automated checks for **semantic drift** (misalignment between BIM and runtime data) during deployment.
   - **Validation**: **Post-deployment testing** using synthetic or real-world sensor data to verify control logic accuracy.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: Incorporation of **probabilistic models** for sensor noise and environmental variability in predictive analytics (e.g., energy consumption forecasts)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **MQTT over TCP/IP** for real-time communication between physical sensors/actuators and the middleware layer (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The connection architecture includes:
   - **Device Management**: Hono handles **device registration, authentication, and telemetry ingestion** via MQTT.
   - **Bidirectional API**: Ditto provides **RESTful endpoints** for control signal transmission and state updates.
   - **Network Protocols**: **MQTT (v5)** for lightweight, publish-subscribe communication with QoS levels for critical data (e.g., emergency alerts).
   - **Security**: TLS 1.2+ for encrypted communication and OAuth 2.0 for authentication/authorization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-native, microservices architecture** with:
   - **Middleware Hosting**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto deployed on **Kubernetes clusters** for scalability and fault tolerance.
   - **Visualization Hosting**: Unreal Engine 5 running on **high-performance GPUs** (e.g., NVIDIA RTX) for real-time rendering.
   - **Data Storage**: **Time-series databases** (e.g., InfluxDB) for operational telemetry and **graph databases** (e.g., Neo4j) for BIM-based relationships.
   - **Deployment Automation**: **CI/CD pipelines** (e.g., Jenkins) for automated artifact generation and deployment from BIM models."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with external systems via:
   - **Standardized APIs**: Ditto’s RESTful interfaces for third-party IoT platforms or cloud services.
   - **BIM Interoperability**: Export/import of BIM models via **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for collaboration with other AECO tools.
   - **Data Federation**: Integration with **enterprise resource planning (ERP)** systems or **building management systems (BMS)** for holistic facility management.
   - **Ontology Alignment**: Use of **domain-specific ontologies** (e.g., for lighting control in TwinLight) to ensure semantic consistency with external systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared between the building owner and DT service provider**, with explicit governance policies defined per tenant (e.g., via Ditto’s tenant isolation). Privacy measures include:
   - **Anonymization**: Occupancy data may be aggregated or anonymized for analytics.
   - **Access Control**: Role-based permissions (e.g., Facility Managers vs. DT Engineers) enforced via Ditto’s OAuth 2.0 integration.
   - **Data Encryption**: End-to-end encryption for telemetry streams (TLS 1.2+) and stored data (AES-256).
   - **GDPR Compliance**: Audit logs for data access and **right-to-erasure** mechanisms for tenant-specific data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** for model interoperability and **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for collaboration.
   - **IoT Standards**: **MQTT (v5)** for telemetry, **OAuth 2.0** for authentication, and **DDS (Data Distribution Service)** for real-time data exchange (where applicable).
   - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Ditto’s **Thing Model** for device representation and **Hono’s** **Telemetry API** for data ingestion.
   - **Control Standards**: **KNX/EIB** or **BACnet** for Building Control System interoperability (where integrated).
   - **Model-Driven Standards**: **MOF (Meta Object Facility)** and **QVT (Queries, Views, Transformations)** for model transformations."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Network Security**: **Firewall rules** and **intrusion detection systems (IDS)** for middleware (Hono/Ditto) to prevent unauthorized access.
   - **Device Authentication**: **TLS 1.2+** for sensor/actuator communication and **OAuth 2.0** for API access.
   - **Control Safety**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** in control logic (e.g., emergency shutdown protocols for HVAC systems).
   - **Physical Safety**: **Remote operation validation** to prevent unintended actuation (e.g., manual override required for critical adjustments).
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 42010** (system engineering standards) and **IEC 62443** (industrial cybersecurity) for critical infrastructure."
]
